description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-shell case with a hinged lid, designed to securely hold and organize six pencils. The case is made of a smooth, matte gray material, likely metal or rigid plastic, and features a simple, minimalist design with no visible branding or decorative elements. The interior is fitted with grooves or slots to keep the pencils neatly aligned and separated. The lid opens widely, providing easy access to the contents, and appears to close flush with the base for secure storage. There are no visible handles, locks, or external pockets, and the corners are smoothly rounded without additional reinforcements. The overall appearance is utilitarian and functional, suitable for carrying drawing or writing instruments in an urban environment.
description: A sleek, gray hard-shell case with a hinged lid, containing six neatly arranged pencils in individual slots. The design is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and no visible external features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open case with six pencils aligned inside, lid fully raised and interior visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the case, the open lid, and the arrangement of pencils.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the closed case, showing a flat, featureless exterior surface.
description_view_3: Rear angled view with the lid open, displaying the pencil slots and the interior layout from the opposite side.
attribute_handle_type: none visible; the case does not have an external handle.
